description_long: This modern bungalow features a sprawling single-story layout with multiple interconnected rectangular structures, surrounded by lush green lawns and palm trees. The property includes a central swimming pool, a tennis court, and several outdoor lounge areas with sunbeds and seating. The main building is characterized by flat roofs, large glass windows, and a mix of white and wooden exterior finishes. There are separate smaller structures, possibly guest houses or recreational pavilions, positioned at the edges of the property. The entrance is marked by a driveway leading to a covered carport, with landscaped pathways connecting the various zones. The overall design emphasizes open spaces, outdoor living, and a seamless blend of indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow complex with flat roofs, large windows, a pool, tennis court, and landscaped outdoor areas surrounded by palm trees.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tennis court, pool, and main building with outdoor lounge areas and palm trees.
description_view_1: Front driveway view highlighting the main entrance, carport, and the central building with visible pathways and landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear side view displaying the tennis court, pool, and the arrangement of smaller outbuildings and main living spaces.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the tennis court, pool, and the rear facades of the main and auxiliary structures.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
